title: The Sea Forest Becomes the Destination
description: On pages 13–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Luffy, Shirahoshi, Jinbe, Zoro. The core story beat is the sea forest becomes the destination.
scene: The scene centers on the sea forest becomes the destination, with Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Luffy, Shirahoshi, Jinbe, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy YAY!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: What?! He's with Princess Shirahoshii....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! Nami!! has the banquet started yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nann Nami- San!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yep, he's cured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this true?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HORDY DID SUCH A THING?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that ryuuguu palace has fallen into such peril...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's happened to zero and the others, then?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know. I was going to go back for them once I found you...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Father has been captured?! I cannot believe it...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hachin!... What happened to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I must apologise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems that you have been drawn into our troubles all too quickly...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This may be sudden...

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: But please understand, when I met Luffy-kun two years ago, even more so than now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...it was simply not the time to speak of such things!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I harbour a profound gratitude towards those responsible for putting a stop to the terror...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that Arlong and his crew wreaked in East Blue...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was your doing, was it not? I must extend you my thanks...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But at the same time, I must apologise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JIMBEI- San...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For eleven years ago, the one responsible for unleashing Arlong upon the waters of East Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...was none other than myself!!!

summary: The Sea Forest Becomes the Destination. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
